title: Blue Silver Star Balloons, 22in Large Star Balloons Foil 10in 4-Pointed & Pentagram Balloon for Graduation Baby Shower Space Themed Birthday Party Decorations
features: Blue Silver Star Balloons: Package includes: dark blue, light blue, silver three-color aluminum foil star balloons (explosion stars × 3, four-pointed stars × 6, five-pointed stars × 6) , a straw and ribbon

Premium Material: The Froova star balloons are made of high-quality aluminum foil. They are odorless, durable, not easy to deform, and have bright colors, making them suitable for a variety of event decorations

Not Helium Support: Theses star foil balloons combination are not suitable for helium, only air. Using ribbons to hang them from the ceiling or use glue to stick them on balloon garland or walls. It will be a unique and beautiful party decoration

Reusable Foil Balloons: The star balloon set is completely reusable. Avoid excessive friction and sharp objects when using it. Use a straw to deflate and flatten it after event, and it will still be a shining decoration at the party next time

Widely used: The blue and silver star balloon set is very suitable for graduation parties, New Year, birthday parties, space theme parties, baby showers, and anniversaries. You can DIY these shining star decorations at your events
